title: Oedipus Rex
writer: Sophocles, E.F. Watling, William Butler Yeats
actors: Douglas Campbell, Eleanor Stuart, Robert Goodier
plot: The land ruled by King Oedipus is plagued by ill-fortune and the people are promised relief by the gods if the slayer of the former king is apprehended and punished. This does not bode well for King Oedipus and his Queen. (Perform...
